text:
AFP - Agence France Presse



Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky criticised the International Olympic Committee's (IOC) decision to allow some Russian athletes to compete at the Paris Games as "piecemeal" sanctions against Moscow over its invasion of Ukraine.

The Barron's news department was not involved in the creation of the content above. This article was produced by AFP. For more information go toAFP.com.© Agence France-Presse
title: Zelensky Slams Olympic Sanctions On Russia As 'Piecemeal'- Barron's
author: AFP - Agence France Presse
description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky criticised the International Olympic Committee's (IOC) decision to allow some Russian athletes to compete at the Paris Games as "piecemeal" sanctions against Moscow over its invasion of Ukraine.
